210.reason: [When encountering a single '&', the lexer reports an error but continues processing. However, it does not check if columnNumber+1 is within bounds before accessing line.charAt(columnNumber + 1), which can cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '&' is at the end of a line.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', the lexer reports an error but continues processing. However, it does not check if columnNumber+1 is within bounds before accessing line.charAt(columnNumber + 1), which can cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '&' is at the end of a line.]

222.reason: [Same issue as above: accessing line.charAt(columnNumber + 1) without checking if columnNumber+1 < line.length() can cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '|' is the last character in the line.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: accessing line.charAt(columnNumber + 1) without checking if columnNumber+1 < line.length() can cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '|' is the last character in the line.]

260.reason: [If a multi-line comment is not closed, the lexer should report an error instead of returning tokens silently. This violates the requirement to output lexical errors.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [If a multi-line comment is not closed, the lexer should report an error instead of returning tokens silently. This violates the requirement to output lexical errors.]

309.reason: [Missing bounds check: if the string literal is not closed, columnNumber will exceed line length causing IndexOutOfBoundsException]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing bounds check: if the string literal is not closed, columnNumber will exceed line length causing IndexOutOfBoundsException]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing bounds check: if the character literal is not closed, columnNumber will exceed line length causing IndexOutOfBoundsException]
